article.body:
# Deleted Broken MOBI Report

Date: 2026-04-18

These `.mobi` files were deleted because they do not contain a valid MOBI signature at offset 60 (`BOOKMOBI`).
They were not repairable via Calibre conversion and their headers were zero-filled.

Deleted count: 159
